resources.string: Sign in to sync your data
Measure mobility & posture to unlock your personalized level.
Browse guided plans on Train or explore free workouts.
Body score %1$d · %2$d pts to next level
Recovery keeps your plan on track.
Time to reassess and unlock your next level.
Rest day — recover and come back stronger.
Start with a body scan to get your plan.
Body score %1$d · %2$d pts to next level
Review your journey and choose the next step.
Recover today and come back stronger.
A guided %1$d-week plan matched to your level.
Your active program and today\'s sessions.
Review your results and choose the next step.
Complete your assessment to generate a plan.
A reassessment is due before the next program.
Explore programs that match your level.
Your plan is synced and ready for today\'s work.
Recovery is part of the plan. Keep it easy today.
Today\'s work is complete. Review your form when ready.
Program finished. Your next step is ready.
Start with a plan or assessment to personalize training.
Start with the first incomplete session.
Light mobility and sleep help recovery.
Open reports to review form and progress.
Reassess or move to the next plan.
Choose a program or finish your assessment.
Start with a guided plan matched to your level.
Explore guided plans matched to your level and goals.
Training preferences arrive in a later phase.
Upgrade to unlock detailed analytics, trends, and export.
Complete your first workout to unlock performance insights.
Average form score %1$d%% across tracked sessions.
Workouts, exercises and programs in one place.
Try a different search or filter.
Choose a ready session by goal, muscle group, level or time. This is the fastest path for users who know what they want to train today.
Try a different search or filter.
Pick a program and Movit will schedule it.
Your journey is ready to review.
Programs turn goals into a weekly training rhythm.
Pick a guided plan and we\'ll schedule it for you.
Pick a guided plan and Movit will schedule it.
Recovery is part of the plan.
Review your journey and choose next steps.
Jump into the next useful training task.
Form score trend for last 7 sessions
Average form score %1$d%% across tracked sets.
Not enough sets to estimate fatigue yet.
Form dropped %1$d%% from set 1 to set %2$d.
Joint breakdown will appear here when your session includes tracked joints.
Hip crease stayed below knee line on 95% of reps.
On the descent, engage core 0.5s before hip hinge to protect lumbar spine.
Slight inward drift on set 4 — focus on pushing knees out.
Form dropped 6% from set 1 to set 4 — within normal range.
Workout data layer is not installed.
Workout not found in your plan.
Changes are saved to your program customizations. The original template stays clean and your schedule can sync back.
Programs are connected objects. Start with the reason, then edit the smallest safe scope.
Saved to your personal program copy.
Used with paused days to resolve current week and day.
Affects expectation and calendar pacing, not exercise content.
Keep progress and customizations, stop date-based advancement.
Camera training is not available on this device yet.
Check your connection and try again.
Real-time pose feedback helps you move safely and effectively.
Reports, trends, and level insights keep you improving.
Personalized plans based on your body scan and goals.
Sign in to continue your training journey.
Join thousands training smarter with AI form analysis.
Enter your email and we\'ll send a reset link.
Check your email for the reset link.
Google Sign-In is not available in this build yet.
Password must be at least 8 characters.
Sign in to sync workouts, reports, and your training level.
Advanced reports, program analytics, and unlimited body scans.
You will need to sign in again to sync workouts and reports.
This helps us personalize your training plan.
Used for load recommendations and scan comparison.
Improves recommendations and body scan comparison.
We\'ll match volume and progression to your background.
What do you want to focus on?
Pick the weekdays you can train.
Home or gym affects equipment defaults.
Review before we build your plan.
I confirm the information is accurate and I\'m cleared to exercise.
Height must be between 120 and 220 cm.
Weight must be between 30 and 200 kg.
Select at least one training day.
Select at least one piece of equipment.
Answer honestly. If you answer Yes to any question, consult a physician before training.
Consult a physician before training if you answered Yes to any question.
Has a doctor ever said you have a heart condition?
Do you feel pain in your chest during physical activity?
Do you lose balance because of dizziness or lose consciousness?
Do you have a bone or joint problem that could be worsened by exercise?
Are you currently prescribed medication for blood pressure or heart condition?
Is there any other reason you should not participate in physical activity?
Are you pregnant or have you given birth in the last 6 months?
Analyzing joint angles in real time
Live pose analysis opens in a later phase.
May affect overhead pressing. Consider mobility work before heavy loads.
Deadlift and squat patterns look solid. Ready for progressive loading.
Track improvements and unlock progression reassessment.
Personalized path based on your level & goals
No active training plan yet. Browse programs to get started.
